items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is blocked due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for sanitizing and escaping user input.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm the implementation of input sanitization and escaping. While the exploratory step aims to validate that all user input is sanitized, there are no specific details or evidence of how this is executed in the system. This lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this requirement.
